_comment: MHM executive team targets. Baseline is established by Mark (mhm-finance) BEFORE targets are set. Do not invent numbers — fields marked PENDING are filled from real data. All currency in USD.
_refreshNote: 2026-07-01 spot-check by Mark: trailing-30d ad revenue $8,220 (2026-06-03 to 2026-07-02) and confirmed June calendar month $8,676.74 (paid invoice, payout 2026-09-05). Baseline fields below still reflect the 2026-06-22 ESTABLISHED figures ($8,437.21/mo, $21.95 RPM) — revenue has moved up modestly since (session RPM ~$22.7-23 trailing 30d). Not re-baselining formally (too soon, <2 weeks since establishment) but flagging the drift for the P&L snapshot delivered 2026-07-01.

sources.costs: PENDING operator confirmation — repo docs contain no confirmed cost figures

monthlyRevenue._totalNote: Partial — ad revenue locked; total blocked on affiliate + costs confirmation

monthlyCosts._openaiNote: PENDING operator confirmation — OpenAI embedding spend not tracked in repo

baseline._netTakeHomeNote: Cannot compute until costs confirmed. Revenue side locked at $8,437.21/mo ad revenue.

trafficAndRpm._ga4Note: GA4 total sessions 404,502 — ~5% higher than Mediavine figure as expected (bot/filter diff)
trafficAndRpm._desktopViewabilityNote: Aggregate ~46% looks low, but Mediavine Optimized Ad Experience (OAE) is ENABLED — desktop/mobile viewability + in-content ads are Mediavine-managed ('no action needed'); per-page dashboard values are mostly 57-82%. NOT a code-side issue. Verified on dashboard 2026-06-22.

adHealth._stickySidebarNote: CORRECTION (2026-06-22, verified on live dashboard): 14.2 is AVERAGE STICKY-SIDEBAR AD IMPRESSIONS PER SESSION, goal 2.0 — NOT a 0-100 health score. Dashboard: 'achieved teal star status. Stay teal by maintaining a score of 2.0 or higher.' We are at ~7x goal = excellent. There is NO sidebar regression; the earlier '14 vs 50' alarm was a misread of this metric. No fix was deployed.
adHealth._privacyPolicyNote: Dashboard 2026-06-22: 'Great! Thanks for keeping your Privacy Policy up-to-date.' The historical 'ok-missing-on-home-page' sub-state has resolved.

baseline.notes: Baseline established 2026-06-22 by Mark (mhm-finance). Revenue side locked from live Mediavine MCP pull and corroborated by GA4. Cost side PENDING operator confirmation — operator offline overnight. Targets below are PROPOSED and require operator approval before they become binding.

targets.method: Ad revenue baseline $8,437/mo. Targets set as % growth over baseline. Weekly derived as monthly / 4.33. Net take-home targets left null until costs are confirmed — revenue targets used as proxy.
targets._approvalNote: Operator must approve these figures before the team treats them as binding. Mark will recompute net-take-home targets once costs are confirmed.

monthly._basis: $8,437 × 1.05. Minimum bar — reflects current RPM improvement work.

yearly._basis: $8,437 × 12 = $101,244 annualized baseline × 1.20. 20% YoY accounts for Q3 seasonal dip in gaming traffic, the rising RPM trend, and operator-side Mediavine levers (floor CPM review, Video). No code 'sidebar fix' is assumed — sidebar is already teal-star.

baseline._stickySidebarNote: Mediavine teal-star metric (goal 2.0); currently ~7x goal — healthy, not a lever.

targets._sessionRpmBasis: +9.3% over baseline. Driven by the rising RPM trend (RPM up ~51% over the trailing 67 days) plus operator-side Mediavine levers (sidebar-sticky floor CPM review, Video/Universal Player). NOT dependent on any code 'sidebar fix' — the sidebar is already at teal-star status.

baseline._source: GA4 total sessions — organic share unknown until GA4 channel breakdown pulled

targets._basis: +3.8% over GA4 baseline 404,502. Conservative — RPM improvement is higher priority than raw traffic per current operator priority.

targets._netTakeHomeNote: Will be set once Vercel, Prisma, and OpenAI costs are confirmed by operator
